challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.hammerTips: The messages you send here will be forwarded along with the challenge status to the challenger, who may reply here or contact you through other channels.
challenge.hammerInput: Please input your question to be reflected, supports Markdown syntax
challenge.confirmUnlockHint: Confirm to spend {{ cost }} points to unlock this hint?
challenge.hammerTips2: Please note, you can only send three messages before the challenger replies, so please try to combine your questions.
challenge.name: challenge name
challenge.tagPlaceholder: challenge tag, use `/` as separator, the first tag will become the challenge category...
challenge.fetchEnvFailed: failed to fetch challenge environment information
challenge.withdrawTips: Are you sure you want to withdraw this challenge? After withdrawal, you can modify the challenge content and publish it again.
challenge.publishTips: Are you sure you want to publish this challenge? After publishing, participants can solve the challenge during the game, and the challenge cannot be modified during the publishing period.
challenge.noHints: The challenge creator has not released any hints yet, think again.
challenge.staticAttachmentTips: Files here will be provided to the contestants in their entirety.
challenge.mappedAttachmentTips: Files here will be mapped to one of the contestants in a hash-like manner. If you need to dynamically distribute multiple attachments, please package them into a compressed file.
challenge.checkerAttachmentTips: Files here are used for checking and will never be accessed by the contestants.

challenge.deleteEnvTips: Are you sure to remove the entire challenge environment configuration? This challenge will become a static challenge.
challenge.deleteEnvImageTips: Are you sure to delete this challenge environment image?
challenge.deleteTips: Are you sure to delete this challenge? Related submission records and scores will be deleted together.
challenge.envHasError: An error occurred, please try restarting the environment after 1 minute or contact the administrator...
challenge.hammerInputAlreadySend: Question already sent, please wait for feedback...

account.deleteAccountTipsTitle1: Please confirm that your account is not really deleted, but is placed in a deactivated and irrecoverable state, the following operations will be executed:
account.deleteAccountTips1: Please confirm that your account is not really deleted, but is placed in a deactivated and irrecoverable state, the following operations will be executed:
account.deleteAccountTipsList1: Your account will be renamed to [DELETED]_<hash>;
account.deleteAccountTipsList2: Your account will be stripped of all permissions and prevented from logging in, nor can it be recovered via email; the email can be used to register another account;
account.deleteAccountTipsList3: Account privacy information will be removed, but publicly published content will be retained;
account.deleteAccountTipsList4: Competition scores, data, etc. bound to the account will be retained, but no information will be provided to prove it is yours.
account.deleteAccountTips2: Please read and confirm the above content carefully! If you really do decide to deactivate your account, please enter your full username {{name}} below to confirm:
account.deleteAccountTips3: Please note, due to the deletion of identity verification-related private information, even if you contact management/operations staff, they will be unable to recover the deactivated account, please think carefully before proceeding.
account.emailVerifyBroken: Verification link has issues, please ensure the email link is correct
account.resendVerifyEmailSuccess: Verification email has been resent to your inbox, please check
account.emailNotVerified: Your account email is not verified, functionality is limited
account.canNotDeleteWhenGameInProgress: To prevent fraudulent behavior, your account cannot be deleted while you are participating in an ongoing game.

shell.noGameSpecifiedTips: Shell can only be used in Challenge environment.
shell.helpTips: directly input the formatted {{flag}} in this terminal to submit, you can input {{help}} to get more usage help.
shell.helpCommands: you have the following commands available:
shell.noChallengeSpecifiedTips: only in Challenge environment can download attachments.

ls.man: List the files of the current challenge.
ls.invalidOption: Unknown option: `{{option}}`; note that the ls command is a /bin/ls -l alias, and does not accept other options.

clear.man: Clear the terminal's output content and start again.

wget.success: download succeeded, please save the file in the browser's pop-up window.

whoami.man: Display the username associated with the current valid user ID.

service.stopTips: Stop the challenge environment service, this command can also stop other challenge environments here.
service.restartTips: Restart the challenge environment service, use this when you accidentally break the challenge environment.
service.statusTips: Display the status of the challenge environment service.
service.delayTips: Extend the challenge environment existence time, the default service time after starting the challenge environment is one hour, if you think the time is not enough, you can use this command to extend.
service.noEnv: This challenge does not provide an online environment.
service.error: failed to get challenge environment configuration
service.onlyOneInstancePersist: Only one challenge service can be started at the same time.
service.onlyOneInstancePersistChoice: Whether to stop other challenge services and start the current challenge?
service.delayError: failed to extend service time limit
